channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lamp post light not working, 28th June
item.description:
The lamp post light at the side of 2 graham place cheltenham Gl510rt is not working it as worked fine for years but last couple night's not been working
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oldbury Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large (30-40 cm in diameter) ash tree fallen across path-route can be accessed by ducking underneath, 28th June
item.description:
Actual location is about 100m north of map location on a section of the path in an unresolved DMMO at approx. https://what3words.com/orange.reporters.proposals
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cirencester Road, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Disgusting mattress, 28th June
item.description:
Mattress and sofa blocking the pavement by the dance school at St George Street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 35, Saint George's Street, Marle Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Signs left behind after road resurfacing, 28th June
item.description:
On the grass verge along side the road there are several signs and sandbags been left behind after the resurfacing was completed

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 21, Hayden Road, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Sign structurally damaged/leaning more than 20 degrees/loose in ground (Non illuminating sign)

item.title: Start of a sink hole!, 28th June
item.description:
Noticed on 28/06, there is a large depression about 6 inches deep and over 30cm wide. In middle of road, but looks a depression started by heatwave

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Naunton Lane, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Junction of Burleigh Croft and Chosen Way, Hucclecote, 28th June
item.description:
3 white vans parked up nose to bumper for over 6 months on the road. They are in a state of disrepair with debris building up around them. 2 of them do not have a valid MOT. The property they are parked outside also has the eyesore of a partly disassembled white van parked facing the street. I suspect they are trading as a small scale breakers business in a residential area. Street parking is becoming an issue due to the residents being unable to access the spaces taken up by these abandoned vehicles that haven't moved more months.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Burleigh Croft, Hucclecote, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping horsebere brook sandyleaze playing field, 28th June
item.description:
Looks like some kind of furniture as in pic

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Little Elmbridge, Elmbridge, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Flytipping (not witnessed and no evidence likely)

item.title: Blocked brain on Lypiatt Drive, 28th June
item.description:
This blockage is causing problems with water running along Lypiatt Road whenever it rains, with knock on impact on the road surface.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 23, Lypiatt Drive, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large pothole on entrance/exit to kingsditch, 28th June
item.description:
On the entrance to the kingsditch retail parking, just after the roundabout, there are multiple large potholes in the yellow boxed area. This causes cars to move erratically and change speeds. These potholes have been there for a few months and steadily been getting worse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kingsditch Lane, Kingsditch, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping bin over spill, 28th June
item.description:
Rubbish left

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cirencester Road, Brockworth, Gloucester
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole that has grown in size., 28th June
item.description:
Junction of Pottersfield Road and Byfield Close.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pottersfield Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface under bridge, 28th June
item.description:
This stretch of road under the bridge and either side is lethal for cyclists. I have caused untold damage to my bike. Visibility poor and issues too numerous to avoid.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gretton Road, Gotherington, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damage to curb from waste recycling lorry outside 3 Hatherley Gate, 27th June
item.description:
Residents at Three Hatherley Gate have raised a concern with a curb outside their lawn, which has been run over a number of times by the recycling and waste lorries, causing a depression in the curb. Could I ask that this is looked at? I will speak to the waste and recycling services and keep them aware of this damage so that they avoid it next time. The residents say there are cables underneath, and they are concerned that when any repair is done, those cables may be disturbed. Just to let you know that.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Hatherley Gate, Warden Hill, Cheltenham, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A pothole in road problem, 27th June
item.description:
low hanging branch above the road, though road is not obstructed as caller could get around it
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass in childrens play area benhall park, 27th June
item.description:
Mainly in metal spinning wheel.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bibury Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: Glass in Childrens Play Area, 27th June
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bibury Road, Hatherley, Cheltenham, Cheltenham

item.title: A small metal cover repeatedly gets lifted off the grass verge, 27th June
item.description:
The metal cover on the grass verge outside Boundary House on Hayden Road has been lifted AGAIN. This is a problem which, if you look at your records, has happened repeatedly ever since we came here in 2002.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hayden Road, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grass verge extremely overgrown obstructing view, 27th June
item.description:
Grass opposite Grenville Close up to Katherine Close, but most of the estate grass verges need mowing
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Trafalgar Drive, Churchdown, Tewkesbury
